dialogos.texto_en: Uuuesuuugi-saaan!
Yo-Yotsuba.\nIt's been a while.
You seem to be doing well, Uesugi-san!\nI'm so glad!
So, what do you think of our \ntown after being away for so long?
Well, it feels like the familiar sights\nstill haven't really changed.
Heeheehee.\nI thought you suddenly came here\nbecause you were homesick or something.
Living alone in Tokyo must be lonely, huh?
Well, it can be lonely.\nThat's why I came to see you.
N-now!\nIt's forbidden to say such things out of the blue!
...You're right.\nWhat am I saying?
So, what are we going to do today?\nWe promised to go on a date, didn't we?
Hmm, let's see.\nFor now, let's take it easy and go with the flow.
Alright.\nThere's no need for me to be so formal with you.
Yes!\nJust being with you is enjoyable.
We can take a leisurely stroll,\nand if we come across an interesting shop,\nwe can check it out.
And to wrap it up,\nhow about finishing on the swings at the park?
That sounds good.\nIt's decided!
Hey, everyone, we're baaack!\nI've brought Uesugi-san!
Sorry for dropping in.
Huh, wait a minute?\nNo one's here, and there's no response.\nDid everyone go out?
Even though Uesugi-san came to visit,\nI wonder where they all went.
(Ah...\n Maybe they're being considerate of us?)
If no one's around...\nThis is our chance, Uesugi-san!
Wh-what?
Let's try on the clothes\nwe bought earlier.
Huh? Here?
There's no need to be embarrassed.\nRight now,\nit's just the two of us who will see it.
Well, that's true, but...
We can't miss this chance!
(Indeed, I can't imagine what the \n others would say if they were to see that. )
Alright, let me try it on.
Hooray!\nThen I'll change in my room.\nAnd you, Uesugi-san...
I'm fine here.\nIt's basically just a sweater anyway.
Ooohh...
It looks good, doesn't it?\nUesugi-san, it suits you very well.
But, well...
...Could it be that you don't like it?
No, no!\nIt's not that I don't like it or anything!
It's just...\nHow should I put this...\nIt's way more embarrassing than I imagined.
Ahaha.\nIt's just matching outfits, though.
I suppose it does feel special since it's with you.
W-when you say it like that, \nit makes me feel embarrassed too!
I wonder what the others would say if they saw us...
Hmm, it's a complex feeling,\nlike wanting to be seen...\nand not wanting to be seen at the same time.
Complex, huh?\nBut it was you who suggested buying them, right?
Yes.\nThe store clerk recommended them,\nand I couldn't help but buy them.
You made a quick decision\nwithout even checking the price.
That's...
Uesugi-san, when the clerk asked\nif you were my boyfriend,\nand you said, 'yes'%p-2;――
Oh, I just got so happy,\nand decided without thinking.
I-is that the reason?
For you, Uesugi-san, it might be just that,\nbut for me, it feels like a miracle...
A-a miracle?! \nThat's a bit of an overreaction.\nI mean, it's true that I'm...your...
......Your b-boyfriend.
Uesugi-san, are you blushing when you say that?
I can't believe the day has come\nwhen I can say such a thing...
With that reaction, if you were to wear this outside,\nyou might collapse from embarrassment, Uesugi-san.
I won't collapse...\nbut it does require quite a bit of courage...
Then let's set these outfits aside\nuntil the perfect moment.
What kind of moment?\nAnyway, let's change before they find us.
Whew...
(...Even if I don't have\n many opportunities to wear it,\n I have to treasure it.)
(Hmm? There's still a bag with clothes in it.\n These aren't mine...)
Sorry to keep you waiting!\nI'm done changing.
Hey, Yotsuba, did you buy more clothes?
Ah! That's%p-2;――%p;!
An apron?\nWhen did you buy something like this?
Ooohh, you saw it...\nI wanted to keep it a secret...
A secret, huh?\nWhat are you scheming?
Well... On my next day off,\nI thought I'd come over\nto your place to hang out, Uesugi-san.
And then, I was planning to cook for you.
This apron...is for that occasion.
...I-is that so?
Did I mess up?
Not at all.\nIf you want to come, I don't mind.\nI'll be looking forward to it.
...Alright.\nPlease wait for me then.
